generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations within AGREE expressions.
Prioritize fixing type mismatches by using valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool).
Ensure guarantees reference only visible features or properly declared helper variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `const name : type = value;` for constant definitions.
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper variable definitions.
Ensure guarantee expressions have a valid type.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid using implementation-level references within component type contracts.
Do not attempt to repair by adding architecture; focus on fixing AGREE expressions.
